title: Grandpa Eddie's boat — liaison-flip side hustle (Sep 12 2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-line plan-stub Yahir scribbles a week before the Austin move: act as liaison between his Grandpa Eddie (boat owner) and prospective buyers, screening for legitimate buyers and avoiding the common scams.
  • Posts the boat himself on Grandpa Eddie's behalf — Yahir runs the listing, takes a cut. "Language support" hinted as part of his value-add (Grandpa Eddie speaks Spanish; this is the same family-bilingual-broker pattern visible in the IDA Translations doc).
  • Resurfaces in the Nov 24 Get a Grip planning doc as a concrete cash-on-hand source: "sell grandpa eddies boat (we can get a commission off of this) … $1500 boat" alongside the car, dad's Ryker, and the RV — the "sell-everything" funding play for the rumored macro buying opportunity.

Privacy

  • Grandpa Eddie referenced by first-name + family-relation only; no contact info, no listing URL, no buyer PII. Document was a planning stub, not a listing.

Relations

  • 2025 11 24 Get a Grip — boat folded into the broader sell-to-deploy plan
  • 2025 12 05 ida translations — same bilingual-liaison value-add pattern
  • yahir family — Grandpa Eddie queued to Potential Entities below
  • bridge income strategies — adjacent micro-income concept

related.label: Im moving to Austin?! — clean-slate identity declaration, soft-death framing
